data.title: Cerapedics Announces Supplier Agreement with Vizient for PearlMatrix® P-15 Peptide Enhanced Bone Graft
data.description: An agreement has been reached that will enhance access to Cerapedics Inc.'s range of peptide-based drug-device offerings for spinal fusion surgeries. This agreement signifies a significant expansion in the availability of these products, with Cerapedics Inc. being a worldwide orthopedic firm focused on transforming bone repair processes. The announcement was made in Westminster, Colo., on April 24, 2026. This development allows a broader audience to take advantage of Cerapedics Inc.'s innovative solutions for spinal fusion procedures, underscoring the company's commitment to advancing orthopedic care.

data.title: Travelers Expands Availability of Homeowners Insurance Under California’s Sustainable Insurance Strategy
data.description: The Travelers Companies, Inc. (NYSE: TRV) has chosen to join California’s Sustainable Insurance Strategy (SIS), a program led by Insurance Commissioner Ricardo Lara, to enhance homeowners insurance availability in the state. By participating voluntarily and notifying the California Department of Insurance (CDI), Travelers aims to broaden its coverage reach. This initiative enables insurance providers to integrate innovative wildfire catastrophe models and reinsurance expenses into their pricing structures for better risk management and sustainable practices.

data.title: DOJ supports Elon Musk's xAI in battle against Colorado's AI bias law, intervening in lawsuit.
data.description: The Justice Department has taken steps to get involved in a lawsuit filed by xAI against Colorado's law on algorithmic discrimination.

data.title: Brad Schneider Completes Acquisition of The Growth Coach Franchise System
data.description: In Columbus, Ohio, on April 24, 2026, Strategic Franchising Systems, a multi-brand franchise development system, revealed that a long-time franchise owner and brand president is now leading the company. This individual is continuing a 20-year legacy of helping small business owners throughout America.

data.title: Citius Pharmaceuticals Announces Closing of Registered Direct Offering of $5 Million Priced At-The-Market Under Nasdaq Rules
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Citius Pharmaceuticals Inc. (Nasdaq: CTXR), a biopharmaceutical company focused on innovative critical care products, completed its latest financial transaction. The company, known for its dedication to developing and bringing to market cutting-edge medical solutions, disclosed the finalization of the deal.

data.title: Ultragenyx Reports Inducement Grant Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 24, 2026, Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc., a biopharmaceutical company traded as NASDAQ: RARE, disclosed the issuance of 36,447 restricted stock units of its common stock to 12 recently recruited non-executive officers. The stock units were granted under the Ultragenyx Employment Inducement Plan on April 16, 2026. This move was sanctioned by the compensation committee of the company’s board of directors and aligns with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4) regarding inducements for new hires.

data.title: HCI Group Declares Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: In Tampa, Florida, on April 24, 2026, HCI Group, Inc. (NYSE: HCI) announced a regular quarterly cash dividend of 40 cents per common share. Shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026, will receive the dividend on June 18, 2026.

data.title: iHuman Inc. Files 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: On April 24, 2026, iHuman Inc. (NYSE: IH), a renowned Chinese provider of technology-driven educational products, disclosed the submission of its annual report for the year concluding on December 31, 2025. The report was filed on Form 20-F with U.S. regulatory authorities.

data.title: Trump and Ellison's private event in Washington: President talks for almost 1 hour at Paramount-sponsored party, sparking conflict concerns.
data.description: During a recent Paramount-hosted event, the president delivered a speech that lasted close to 60 minutes. The event brought up concerns regarding conflicts of interest within journalism and regulation.

data.title: Judge sanctions plaintiff and her attorney in case against billionaire Leon Black. Lawyer alleged to have lied repeatedly to the Court.
data.description: A federal judge has stated that the attorney representing an undisclosed plaintiff, who alleged that a billionaire investor had abused her, had misled the Court multiple times.

data.title: RGC Resources, Inc. Schedules Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
data.description: RGC Resources, Inc. (Nasdaq: RGCO) based in Roanoke, VA, has announced their upcoming quarterly conference call and webcast to discuss the outcomes of their fiscal Q2 2026. The event is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. EST on May 8, 2026. Interested parties can access presentation materials ahead of the call on the Investor & Financial Information section of the company's website at https://www.rgcresources.com/investor-financial-information/.

data.title: Echo West Endeavors Launches to Bring Psychology, Operational Strategy, and Humor Together Under One Brand
data.description: Established by Dina Jill Robinson, the platform offers a unique perspective on leadership, coaching, parenting, and personal clarity through a blend of psychology, operational strategy, and humor. A key feature is the Calm Parent Operating System. Located in Beverly Hills, Michigan, the initiative was introduced in April.

data.title: Hennion & Walsh Asset Management Named to USA TODAY's Top Financial Advisory Firms for 2026
data.description: On April 24, 2026, in Parsippany, New Jersey, Hennion & Walsh Asset Management revealed its recognition as one of the Top Financial Advisory Firms for 2026 by USA TODAY. The list, released on April 14, 2026, celebrates firms nationwide for their dedication to providing financial guidance and support.

data.title: Franklin Street Properties Corp. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results
data.description: Wakefield, Massachusetts - Franklin Street Properties Corp., a real estate investment trust (REIT) traded on NYSE American under FSP, stated that it will disclose its first quarter 2026 outcomes post-market closure on Tuesday, April 28, 2026. Unlike previous quarters, there will not be a conference call/webcast. For further updates on FSP, including this press release, visit www.fspreit.com. Additional details and updates are regularly posted on the website.

data.title: Hopebridge Delivers Broad Impact Across Six Sessions at CASP 2026
data.description: Hopebridge, a prominent provider of Applied Behavior Analysis (ABA) services for children with Autism, is set to host various sessions at the upcoming 2026 Council of Autism Service Providers (CASP) Annual Conference in Las Vegas on April 24th. The conference aims to bring together professionals in the field to share knowledge and insights. Hopebridge's participation highlights their commitment to offering evidenced-based ABA services.

data.title: Park National Corporation reports financial results for first quarter 2026
data.description: In Newark, Ohio, on April 24, 2026, Park National Corporation (Park) (NYSE American: PRK) released its financial performance for the initial quarter of 2026. The board of directors announced a quarterly cash dividend of $1.10 per common share. This dividend will be distributed on June 10, 2026, to common shareholders who are recorded as of May 15, 2026.

data.title: Pyxis Tankers Announces CFO Transition
data.description: In Maroussi, Greece, on April 24, 2026, Pyxis Tankers Inc. disclosed that their Chief Financial Officer, Henry Williams, will resign by the culmination of April, 2026. Starting May 1, 2026, Fotis Giannakoulis will take over the CFO position at the international shipping firm. Pyxis Tankers Inc. operates on the NASDAQ Capital Markets under the ticker symbol PXS.
US bank deposits rose to $19.099 tln from $19.056 tln in the prior week.
